subject: [For Your Approval] CorpPass Application to apply for Enterprise Development Grant - Enterprise Singapore
deck_filename: Shopee Singapore LOF - Partnership with Shopee to Drive SMEs Internationalisation.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Shuning,

As part of requesting CorpPass access from Legal, will require approval
from you first and followed by Ian's.

For context, this is in continuation of the second grant application to be
applied for the launch of SGPH SIP and support of SGMY Direct. The grant
application was put on hold previously due to ongoing discussions for KPI
alignment and ESG's revamped application process. CorpPass is like SingPass
for businesses and ESG had shifted their application process to an online
portal requiring CorpPass access.

CorpPass access request template to Legal (for your reference) - Link
<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1FueNSWORsT1Fj9akRTd1BXpz0T0RWoB_/edit>

Thank you.

Best regards,

*How Sai Kit*
Shopee | Cross Border | Shopee International Platform

Hi Ian,

Seek your approval for CorpPass access application to Legal for application
of Enterprise Development Grant - Industry with Enterprise Singapore.
Please see Shuning's approval in the previous reply. Thank you.

Best regards,

*How Sai Kit*
Shopee | Cross Border | Shopee International Platform

Hi Ian,

Just an update, will get Legal to assign CorpPass Access to you as well for
the role of "BGP Acceptor" as this is needed to accept the Letter of Offer
issued by Enterprise Singapore. Will inform you again when the Letter of
Offer is being issued.

Will need you to activate your CorpPass account, instructions can be found
in the email that Legal will be sending to you. Thank you.

Best regards,

*How Sai Kit*
Shopee | Cross Border | Shopee International Platform

Hi Ian,

The grant application has been approved and a Letter of Offer has been
issued for your acceptance by Enterprise Singapore. Seek your help to
accept on BGP 2.0 portal. Please see attached PDF version of the Letter of
Offer.

Will reach out to Legal side again to ensure the relevant CorpPass role is
assigned to you in order to accept the offer. Thank you.

Steps:
- https://www.apply.gov.sg/grants/business/dashboard
- Select BGP 2.0 and login via your own Singpass

Best Regards,

*How Sai Kit*
Shopee | Cross Border | Shopee International Platform

Hi Ian,

Can I check if you have activated the CorpPass account? Will need to
ownself activate after Legal assigns the role. There is an email
notification with your own Reference ID to input (see screenshot below).
[image: image.png]

Best regards,

*How Sai Kit*
Shopee | Cross Border | Shopee International Platform

content.question:
Cannot see anything



*From:* How Sai Kit <saikit.how@shopee.com>
*Sent:* Friday, 14 November 2025 6:59 pm
*To:* Ian Ho <hoi@sea.com>
*Cc:* Shuning Wang <shuning.wang@shopee.com>; Cuiwei Sun <
cuiwei.sun@shopee.com>; Yu Zhang <yu.zhang@shopee.com>
*Subject:* Re: [For Your Approval] CorpPass Application to apply for
Enterprise Development Grant - Enterprise Singapore



 Hi Ian,

Can I check if you have activated the CorpPass account?

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Sent as attached image.


*How Sai Kit*
Shopee | Cross Border | Shopee International Platform

Hi Ian,

Summarizing the entire email thread for your context and please see below
for step-by-step instructions.

Context:

   -

   Enterprise Singapore agreed with a $241,200 grant to co-sponsor SGPH SIP
   and SGMY Direct launch
   -

   Shopee Legal stipulates that Shopee HOD needs to accept the Letter of
   Offer by using CorpPass.

Step by step Instruction:

   -

   Step 1: to activate CorpPass:
   - Visit https://www.corppass.gov.sg > Service > Manage accounts >
      Activate Account
      [image: Screenshot 2025-11-18 142203.jpg]
      - Enter Reference ID (from Legal's email). There should be an email
      titled “Action Required - Activate your CorpPass User Account” sent
      by the Legal team previously.
      [image: Screenshot 2025-11-18 142446.jpg]
      - Examples for* r**eference number* from the Legal email
      [image: Screenshot 2025-11-18 142623.jpg]
      - Activate your account (Please ensure you have activated your
      CorpPass first before going to next step)
   - Step 2: to accept grant Letter of Offer:
      - Login to https://www.apply.gov.sg/grants/business/dashboard under
      BGP 2.0 to accept the Letter of Offer
      [image: Screenshot 2025-11-18 142818.jpg]

Hope this clarifies. Please feel free to reach out if you have any further
questions, thank you.

Best regards
Zhang Yu

content.question: @Kassy Ong <kassy.ong@shopee.com> can help me for this?

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Okay sure, I have activated your corppass account and will liaise with
Zhang Yu on the next step.

Thank you.

Best Regards,
Kassy Ong

Hi Ian,

An update that we have activated your BGP Acceptor role access and
successfully accepted the grant Letter of Offer.

Thank you.

Best Regards,
Kassy Ong
